name: Slack Privileged Accounts Without MFA
description: Detects privileged slack accounts missing MFA protections.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.name AS account_name FROM slack_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.deleted, false) = false AND (COALESCE(u.is_admin, false) = true OR COALESCE(u.is_owner, false) = true OR COALESCE(u.is_primary_owner, false) = true) AND COALESCE(u.has_2fa, false) = false
remediation: Immediately enforce MFA on privileged identities and suspend privileged actions until compliant.
